scripts.build: bun run build:worker && bun run build:extension
scripts.typecheck: tsc -p packages/shared/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/extension-core/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/extension-api/tsconfig.json && tsc -p apps/worker/tsconfig.json && tsc -p apps/extension/tsconfig.json && tsc -p scripts/tsconfig.json
